schema: memory verdicts (KEEP/SKIP/REWRITE) — flat, one row per fact, no content beyond diff

rules.KEEP: Write this fact to fact_store. Use the proposed fact as-is.
rules.SKIP: Do not write. Fact is not useful or is duplicate of current memory.
rules.REWRITE: I will edit the fact text inline before committing. Use my edited version.
rules.EDIT: I will provide a free-form replacement. I will paste the new fact.

facts.proposed_fact: Kai operates 6 strictly entity-firewalled projects: LUMINARA, SWARM ORACLE, AWAKING, KORËNA, Point4Brand/MONETIZE-BOT, Kai Djuric. No cross-contamination of brand assets or identities.
Kai Djuric is the animal-whisperer brand, strictly firewalled from LUMINARA / KORËNA / Point4Brand.
KORËNA is a fashion brand. Visual system: Royal Gold/Bronze + Azure Fluid palettes. Rules: mono-material, no seasonal drops, no sale-ever. Launch priority = Serbia first.

Kai Djuric is a solo creative technologist, electronic musician, VJ performer, graphic artist, developer based in Ovača, Central Serbia. Plays trumpet, practices chaos magic alongside Serbian Orthodox tradition, Vajrayana Buddhism, and consciousness exploration. Has a dog named Koreka.
ULUS-recognized graphic artist. Sigilization is a native graphic practice.
MORPHA Protocol core axiom: 'Never cut, only morph.' Spiritual bypass test applied to all content: if removing the spiritual element doesn't change the output, it's decorative — flag it.
facts.source: export conversations_memory + dedicated MORPHA project memory

facts.proposed_fact: CRAAP Test (Currency/Relevance/Authority/Accuracy/Purpose) is Kai's source evaluation framework.
Priority hierarchy: spiritual integrity → UX → technical elegance → business viability.

Known pattern: high project initiation, lower completion. FROZEN.md scope firewall and completion accountability protocols exist to counter this. Cognitive twin mode: match energy, commit to perspectives without hedging, challenge scope creep, help him finish things.
Session OS files live at ~/kai-os/ as 4 files: CLAUDE.md, SESSION.log, SPIRITUAL.md, CURRENT.md. At conversation start, silently read them and auto-map topics. At close, update SESSION.log on disk.
LUMINARA is a frequency-based consciousness toolkit. A=432 Hz tuning (C4=256 Hz), 12 zodiacal archetypal keys, sacred geometry (Platonic solids), bija mantras, voice toning as the primary instrument.

LUMINARA six named products: VYSIO (audio-reactive music video), LUMINARA Toolkit, Light Spectrum, Studio, VJ Performance, Creator Portal. v3 (current shipped state) uses 16 deployed HTML pages + hyperframe canvas + brand kit.
Gumroad digital product line: GLIF Display (7-weight family), Ovača Mono (Serbian Cyrillic), dingbat fonts, SVG icon libraries. LUMINARA shop page lists 15 products.

SWARM ORACLE: swarm intelligence prediction engine. Stack: React + Three.js, Neo4j, TypeScript, pgvector, LLM layer (Ollama qwen2.5:32b primary, OpenAI-compatible cloud burst). Paper trading default, live trading requires explicit flag. MiroFish-inspired. CLAUDE.md exists, FROZEN.md scope firewall.
MORPHA Protocol codex: 26 Persona Currents, 25 Dimensional Planes, 22 Major Arcana reframes, 59-icon SVG library, chaos magic integration.

Active skill ecosystem: kai-session-os, sy-cipher (token compression), decision-engine (fast/guided/hybrid modes), epublish-krea (Krea API + publishing), ebook-publishing (KDP/Gumroad/IngramSpark/audiobook via ElevenLabs w/ Serbian support), boris-cherny-claude-code-stack (5-layer monorepo), ai-engineering-patterns, agentic-memory-design, font-maker (variable font pipeline, OTF), luminara-video-pipeline.

AWAKING book series: Harmonic Zodiac system (12 zodiac signs → audio frequencies, mudras, Kuji-In seals, self-initiation protocols). TAM/RAN chapters. References: Steiner, Sacred Geometry, Cathie Grid, Éliphas Lévi. Audiobook pipeline via ElevenLabs/ACX. Target audience: people who feel stuck, lost, or in pain.

Active Suno AI music production focus: café/lounge instrumental tracks fusing Indian classical structures (alap, gat, jhala, raga terminology, tabla/mridangam percussion) with bossa nova + microhouse aesthetics. Also Suno prompts in 'kai-voice' for Serbian-language content. Project album: Kosmičko Buđenje (12 songs, Serbian).
Blocked infrastructure: video pipeline (Midjourney + Remotion) has no local render output. Claude Code Remote Control unavailable in Serbia (rollout delay).
